Adventurer Challenge
Frost Heat Ring

Once in a while, when an enemy uses an amulet or ring ability, the ring wearer deals 176000 pure damage to that enemy and all enemies in a small radius around them, and silences the armor and weapons of affected enemies. They cannot use weapon or armor abilities for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
